title: Short-Form Content Shoot Assistant
short_desc: Help us capture and organize one day of TikTok and Reels content for a product launch.
long_desc: We are filming a launch day content batch for a consumer app and need a student who can help on set, track the shot list, capture behind-the-scenes clips, and sort raw footage for our editor. This is a fast, practical gig with clear deliverables and a tight timeline.
requirements: Comfortable filming on iPhone. Organized under time pressure. Basic knowledge of TikTok or Instagram content formats.
tags: content, tiktok, reels, production, social media

title: Email Marketing Setup Sprint
short_desc: Set up a clean welcome flow and two campaign templates in Klaviyo.
long_desc: We need help getting our email marketing basics in place before a campaign push. You will organize segments, build a simple welcome automation, format two newsletter templates, and document what was set up so the founder can reuse it after the sprint.
requirements: Comfortable with Klaviyo, Mailchimp, or similar tools. Good eye for copy and formatting. Able to work independently from a checklist.
tags: email marketing, klaviyo, crm, campaigns, copywriting

title: Growth Marketing Assistant
short_desc: Support weekly campaign launches, creator outreach, and basic reporting.
long_desc: You will work with our growth lead on recurring launch tasks across paid social, creator coordination, and lightweight reporting. This role is ideal for a student who wants exposure to how a startup growth team runs experiments and turns them around quickly.
requirements: Strong writing skills. Comfortable in Google Sheets. Curious about startup marketing. Available 10-15 hours per week.
tags: growth, paid social, creators, reporting, campaigns

title: Landing Page Frontend Fix
short_desc: Clean up spacing, broken buttons, and form behavior on our main marketing page.
long_desc: Our marketing site is close, but a few UI issues are hurting conversions. We need someone to fix layout bugs, tighten responsive spacing, and make sure the lead form and CTA buttons behave consistently across desktop and mobile. The work is scoped and ready to hand off.
requirements: Comfortable with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript or React. Able to debug responsive layout issues. Familiar with Git.
tags: frontend, landing page, css, bug fix, web

title: Mobile Responsiveness QA Sprint
short_desc: Test our student dashboard on phones and tablets and log reproducible UI issues.
long_desc: We are shipping a new dashboard and want one focused testing sprint before release. You will run through key flows on different viewport sizes, capture screenshots, write clean bug reports, and retest fixes as they land. This is a great role for someone detail-oriented who likes finding edge cases.
requirements: Careful and systematic. Comfortable writing clear bug reports. Bonus if you have used browser dev tools or testing tools before.
tags: qa, mobile, responsiveness, bug reports, testing

title: Junior Analytics Assistant
short_desc: Help us clean event data and build weekly product usage summaries.
long_desc: You will support our product team by checking event tracking quality, cleaning simple exports, and preparing a weekly report on user activation and retention. We are looking for someone who is comfortable with messy data and excited to learn how product analytics works inside an early-stage SaaS startup.
requirements: Comfortable with spreadsheets. Basic SQL or Python is a plus. Good attention to detail and curiosity about product metrics.
tags: analytics, product data, sql, reporting, metrics

title: Simple Financial Forecast Builder
short_desc: Turn our assumptions into a 12-month cash flow and revenue model.
long_desc: We have the business assumptions and need a student to translate them into a clean forecasting model for our next investor update. You will build a simple but readable sheet covering revenue, hiring, software spend, and runway, then walk the founders through how to update it later.
requirements: Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills. Comfortable with formulas and clean spreadsheet structure. Finance or business background preferred.

title: CRM Data Cleanup Gig
short_desc: Organize duplicate leads, tags, and notes in our sales pipeline.
long_desc: Our CRM is messy after a busy fundraising and sales month. We need help cleaning duplicate entries, standardizing stages, filling missing fields, and producing a short handover note on what changed. It is straightforward work but important for the whole team.
requirements: Very organized. Comfortable with spreadsheets or CRM tools. Able to spot inconsistencies and work methodically.
tags: crm, operations, admin, pipeline, data cleanup

title: Business Development Intern
short_desc: Research leads, prep outreach lists, and support early partnership conversations.
long_desc: You will work with our founder on weekly business development tasks including researching potential partners, structuring lead lists, drafting outreach notes, and joining selected intro calls. The role is hands-on and well suited to a student interested in startup sales or partnerships.
requirements: Strong written communication. Comfortable researching companies online. Confident in spreadsheets and note-taking.
tags: business development, partnerships, research, outreach, leads

title: Sustainability Report Draft Assistant
short_desc: Help compile our first lightweight impact report for SME customers and partners.
long_desc: We are preparing a simple impact report and need support pulling together case studies, metrics, and visual structure into a draft that the founder can polish. You will gather source material, summarize findings, and turn rough notes into a coherent first version.
requirements: Strong writing and synthesis skills. Interested in climate or ESG topics. Comfortable working from messy notes and source docs.

title: Competitor Research Analyst
short_desc: Map the climate software tools our target customers are currently comparing.
long_desc: We need a fast-moving research sprint on competitors in carbon accounting and sustainability reporting. You will compare pricing, positioning, features, and customer segments, then summarize the findings in a decision-ready table and short presentation for the team.
requirements: Strong desk research skills. Comfortable summarizing information clearly. Bonus if you have used Notion, Slides, or Excel for structured comparisons.
tags: competitor analysis, research, climate tech, market, strategy

title: Carbon Data Operations Assistant
short_desc: Support our team with emissions data entry, QA checks, and customer spreadsheet cleanup.
long_desc: You will help our climate operations lead maintain clean emissions datasets and customer uploads. Tasks include checking units, spotting missing values, standardizing spreadsheet formats, and preparing uploads for review. It is a practical operations role with a sustainability angle.
requirements: Comfortable in spreadsheets. Careful with repetitive data tasks. Interested in sustainability and data quality.
tags: operations, carbon data, spreadsheets, qa, sustainability

title: Pitch Deck Designer
short_desc: Turn rough founder notes into a clean 12-slide investor deck for meetings next week.
long_desc: A founder we support has the story but not the visuals. We need a student designer to help structure slides, clean up hierarchy, tighten charts, and make the deck feel credible and modern without overdesigning it. The sprint is quick and feedback cycles will be fast.
requirements: Comfortable in Figma, Keynote, or PowerPoint. Strong sense of layout and hierarchy. Able to work quickly from feedback.
tags: pitch deck, presentation, design, slides, investor

title: User Testing Support Coordinator
short_desc: Recruit participants, schedule sessions, and organize notes for a usability test week.
long_desc: We are running a short user testing cycle for a client and need help with logistics and documentation. You will coordinate participant outreach, confirm slots, prepare the session tracker, and consolidate observations after each call so the product team can move fast.
requirements: Highly organized. Friendly and clear in email communication. Comfortable working with schedules, docs, and note summaries.
tags: user testing, coordination, research ops, scheduling, notes

title: Product Design Intern
short_desc: Support wireframes, UI cleanups, and small design system tasks across client work.
long_desc: You will join our small design team for short, focused product design work across two startup clients. Expect a mix of wireframing, responsive UI polish, component cleanup, and feedback rounds with senior designers. Great role for a student who wants real product design reps.
requirements: Portfolio with at least one product design project. Comfortable in Figma. Good eye for spacing, typography, and component consistency.
tags: product design, figma, ui, wireframes, design system
